# British Columbia Personal Information Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Canada - British Columbia
Region: CA-BC
Citation: Personal Information Protection Act
Authority: BC Laws / OIPC BC
Source URL: https://www.bclaws.gov.bc.ca/civix/document/id/complete/statreg/03063_01
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, retention_deletion, accountability
Keywords: BC PIPA, British Columbia privacy, personal information

## Summary
BC private-sector privacy law covering consent, reasonable purposes, access/correction, safeguards, and retention.

## Key compliance obligations
- Collect, use, and disclose personal information for reasonable purposes.
- Provide access and correction rights.
- Protect information and retention practices.
